title: LegalGuidance
description: A CCHR legal enforcement guidance, fact sheet, or Legal Library publication interpreting the NYC Human Rights Law (e.g. guidance on gender identity/expression, race/hairstyle, source of income, disability, the Fair Chance Act). NET-NEW / reference: these are published only as HTML pages and PDFs on nyc.gov/site/cchr/law/legal-library.page and /media/publications.page — there is NO catalog API and NO Open Data twin. This schema turns the guidance corpus into a structured, referenceable resource.

guidanceId.description: Stable identifier / slug for the guidance document.

title.description: Title of the guidance or publication.

summary.description: Short description of what the guidance covers.

documentUrl.description: Direct link to the PDF, where published.

languages.description: Languages the document is available in (CCHR publishes many materials in multiple languages).
